requirement_raw: Add a QR code generation endpoint for shortened URLs, returning a PNG the client can embed.

code_files.app/qr.py:
"""QR code endpoint: renders a short URL's redirect target as a PNG QR code.

Kept as an isolated APIRouter in its own module so app.main's existing endpoints
are untouched - wiring it in is a single app.include_router() call.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import io

import qrcode
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from fastapi.responses import Response
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from app.db import get_session
from app.repository import SQLAlchemyURLRepository, URLRepository

router = APIRouter()


def get_repository(session: Session = Depends(get_session)) -> URLRepository:
    return SQLAlchemyURLRepository(session)


@router.get("/{code}/qr")
def get_qr_code(code: str, repo: URLRepository = Depends(get_repository)) -> Response:
    record = repo.get_by_code(code)
    if record is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="short URL not found")

    image = qrcode.make(record.long_url)
    buffer = io.BytesIO()
    image.save(buffer, format="PNG")
    return Response(content=buffer.getvalue(), media_type="image/png")
code_files.tests/test_qr.py:
"""Tests for the GET /{code}/qr PNG QR code endpoint."""

from __future__ import annotations

import io

import qrcode


def test_qr_code_returns_png_encoding_long_url(client):
    shorten_response = client.post("/shorten", json={"long_url": "https://example.com/some/page"})
    assert shorten_response.status_code == 201
    code = shorten_response.json()["code"]

    response = client.get(f"/{code}/qr")

    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.headers["content-type"] == "image/png"
    assert response.content.startswith(b"\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n")

    expected_image = qrcode.make("https://example.com/some/page")
    expected_buffer = io.BytesIO()
    expected_image.save(expected_buffer, format="PNG")
    assert response.content == expected_buffer.getvalue()


def test_qr_code_differs_for_different_long_urls(client):
    first = client.post("/shorten", json={"long_url": "https://example.com/first"})
    second = client.post("/shorten", json={"long_url": "https://example.com/second"})

    first_qr = client.get(f"/{first.json()['code']}/qr")
    second_qr = client.get(f"/{second.json()['code']}/qr")

    assert first_qr.content != second_qr.content


def test_qr_code_unknown_code_returns_404(client):
    response = client.get("/doesnotexist/qr")
    assert response.status_code == 404


def test_qr_code_does_not_require_api_key(client):
    shorten_response = client.post("/shorten", json={"long_url": "https://example.com/x"})
    code = shorten_response.json()["code"]

    client.headers.pop("X-API-Key", None)
    response = client.get(f"/{code}/qr")

    assert response.status_code == 200


def test_existing_stats_endpoint_still_reachable_alongside_qr_route(client):
    shorten_response = client.post("/shorten", json={"long_url": "https://example.com/x"})
    code = shorten_response.json()["code"]

    stats_response = client.get(f"/{code}/stats")

    assert stats_response.status_code == 200
    assert stats_response.json()["code"] == code
